series_metadata.series_description: Records maintained for each employee employed at the Ohio Attorney General's Office (AGO) covering their employment history, job performance, and other related personal information. Records include, but are not limited to, application/resume, new hire documentation, position descriptions, HR requests, recommendations for hire, personnel actions, training records, change of address forms, emergency contact information, letters of commendation, policy and procedure acknowledgments, performance evaluations, disciplinary documents, employment verification, and separation records.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: from effective date of employee separation. ; Paper: from effective date of employee separation. If scanned and saved electronically, dispose of paper immediately
